docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $470.55 FILED BY FONG CHESTER AS TO DEFENDANT MACHKOVSKY GREGORY MACHKOVSKY SILVESTER MACHKOVSKY ALISA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-11-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 02
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MACHKOVSKY SILVESTER

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FONG CHESTER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MACHKOVSKY GREGORY MACHKOVSKY SILVESTER $470.55 PRINCIPAL, $28.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $498.55 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT MACHKOVSKY SILVESTER HEARING SET FOR NOV-04-1991 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 05
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF NOV-04-1991, OFF CALENDAR AS TO DEFENDANT MACHKOVSKY SILVESTER
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT MACHKOVSKY GREGORY MACHKOVSKY SILVESTER MACHKOVSKY ALISA
